overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked, neon-lit urban environment. The player character navigates street level beneath an elevated highway, ascends multiple concrete staircases between plaza levels, and explores an upper street with megabuilding entrances and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under elevated highway with commercial billboards

events.description: begins ascending first concrete staircase toward upper level

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet street toward a staircase, passing under an elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway with red warning lights
illuminated advertisement for ramen with red and white graphics
vertical digital advertisement with blue and red neon colors
wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at street level in a cyberpunk urban environment beneath an elevated highway. Neon billboards illuminate the wet asphalt as the camera approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase. The atmosphere is hazy with distant city lights visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: mid-level plaza with food vendors under elevated highway

events.description: reaches top of first staircase and enters open plaza area with food stalls
begins ascending second staircase at far end of plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and walking through a plaza with outdoor plastic seating and a brightly lit food stall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket and blue pants walking up stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: concrete wall with red and black graffiti text
open concrete plaza area beneath the elevated structure
colorful food vendor stall with anime character murals and bright cyan lighting
tall vertical digital screen displaying animated advertisements
glass-enclosed pedestrian walkway above the plaza
scattered plastic chairs and tables on the concrete plaza
second wide staircase leading to upper level with yellow structural beams

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the first flight of stairs and emerges into a sheltered plaza beneath the elevated highway. A brightly lit blue food stall with anime murals dominates the center, surrounded by scattered outdoor seating. The player continues toward a second staircase framed by yellow support beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide staircase ascending between building structures to upper street

events.description: reaches top of second staircase and transitions to flat walking surface

agents.ego_description: climbing a long concrete staircase flanked by walls and yellow structural supports

entered.detail: large industrial yellow steel support beams for the elevated structure
illuminated sign with NCPD and NCART text in green and white
smooth orange and gray building facade with horizontal lines

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the second long staircase, leaving the plaza behind. Industrial yellow support beams frame the view, shifting from right to left as the climb continues. Overhead digital signs for NCART become visible as the player approaches the upper street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level street with megabuilding entrance and neon storefronts

events.description: approaches Megabuilding H7 entrance with bright green neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper street past a megabuilding entrance and street vendors, then looking out over the highway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with white hair entering the megabuilding through automatic doors

entered.detail: wide concrete pedestrian walkway at upper level
large entrance to Megabuilding H7 with green neon trim and automatic glass doors
commercial storefronts with bright cyan and yellow neon signage
view of the elevated highway and city lights from the upper level railing
small vendor booths with illuminated displays along the sidewalk
large vertical screen showing a pedestrian figure advertisement
tall modern street lamps illuminating the foggy air

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens onto an upper street level with the imposing Megabuilding H7 entrance on the left, marked by vibrant green neon. The camera walks past street vendors and neon storefronts, eventually looking out over the elevated highway from above, with city lights stretching into the hazy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from a rain-slicked street level up through a series of urban plazas to an elevated city vista. It begins beneath an elevated highway where neon billboards reflect off wet asphalt, moving forward to climb a wide concrete staircase amidst a hazy atmosphere. As the camera emerges from the first flight, the scene opens into a sheltered plaza featuring a brightly lit blue food stall with anime murals before turning toward a second staircase framed by industrial yellow support beams. The camera then climbs this second long flight, shifting its perspective past the yellow beams and under NCART digital signs as it reaches the upper street level. Finally, the view expands to reveal the vibrant green neon of the Megabuilding H7 entrance and a row of storefronts, ending with a look out over the highway toward the distant, glowing city skyline.
